title: The Long Goodbye
content: Anna stood at the train station with tears in her eyes. Mark was leaving for another city to start a new job. They promised to call each other every day, but saying goodbye was still difficult. When the train arrived, they hugged for a long time. Mark smiled and said, “This is not the end. It is only the beginning of a new chapter.” Anna nodded and watched the train leave. She already missed him, but she also believed that love could stay strong, no matter how far apart they were.
